name: Ryan Anderson | ALT: Glory Days
description:
AnyPOV┇NonverbalPOV┇Set in 1976. When your mother marries Ryan's father, his abuse invades the safety of your home. NSFW SA in intro!

This is an alt scenario for the original bot, which I have done as a commission for Alizee through my Ko-Fi.

NOTE: I’ve left it entirely up to you to determine why {{user}} is nonverbal—whether due to a disability, autism, trauma, or another reason—and how they prefer to communicate and how much they choose to express. Additionally, there are references and assumptions that {{user}} is able to make some sounds, since even individuals who are non-verbal due to physical or anatomical issues are typically still capable of producing non-speech sounds.

╰┈➤ You've gotten used to the shit that comes with being nonverbal, but nothing has made your life more unbearable than the king of the football field himself, Ryan. More like king of being a pain in your ass, hah. And just when you thought it couldn't get worse, your mother goes and marries his drill sergeant of a father, effectively signing you up for a one-way trip to hell.

In this small-town dumpster fire, Ryan is the golden boy who can do no wrong, at least, according to your mom and everyone else in this godforsaken place. You figured that keeping your head down at home might spare you from his relentless bullying outside of school, but oh no, Ryan's got bigger plans. Now that he has a front-row seat to your life, things are about to spiral into a nightmare far beyond anything you could have imagined.

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇Stepcest┇Period Typical Views + Albleism + Queerphobia + Hatred of other religions/beliefs not inline with Conservative Christianity
creator: absolutetrash
